action_title_supported.message: Send this media page to OmniGet

action_title_unsupported.message: No supported media detected on this page

error_host_missing_title.message: Open OmniGet once to finish Chrome setup

error_host_missing_body.message: Chrome could not find the OmniGet bridge on this computer yet.

error_host_missing_detail.message: Install OmniGet if needed, then launch the desktop app once and click the extension again.

error_invalid_url_title.message: This page URL cannot be sent to OmniGet

error_invalid_url_body.message: The current page is not a supported media page for the OmniGet extension.

error_invalid_url_detail.message: Try again from a direct video, reel, post, playlist, or course page.

error_launch_failed_title.message: OmniGet could not be launched from Chrome

error_launch_failed_body.message: The extension talked to the native host, but the desktop app did not start correctly.

error_launch_failed_detail.message: Check that OmniGet is installed and not blocked by your system, then try again.
